RESPONDENT DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES'S MOTION FOR CLARIFICATION RE RULING ON PETITIONER ERIC KLEINBUB'S PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE IS CONTINUED TO SEPTEMBER 20, 2011 TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE GIORGI. ORDER GRANTING RESPONDENT DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLE'S MOTION FOR CLARIFICATION RE RULING ON PETITIONER ERIC KLEINBUB'S PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE

LAW AND MOTION 302, RESPONDENT DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES MOTION FOR CLARIFICATION RE RULING ON PETITIONER ERIC KLEINBUB'S PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - THE COURT CLARIFIES ITS RULING TO STATE THAT ATTORNEY FEES ARE DENIED. HOWEVER COSTS ARE AWARDED TO PETITIONER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. IN ADDITION, THE COURT SIGNED RESPONDENT'S ORDER RE PETITIONER'S WRIT OF MANDATE RE HEARING OF 7/8/11. JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI, REPORTER: KARLA ELLIS-DAVIS, CSR #12998

calendar.matters:
Notice And Motion For Clarification Re Ruling On Petitioner Eric Kleinbub'S Petition For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Sep-20-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
RESPONDENT DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES MOTION FOR CLARIFICATION RE RULING ON PETITIONER ERIC KLEINBUB'S PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE.

APPEARANCES: John T. McGlothlin, Deputy Atty General 510/622-2224 for respondent & moving party; no other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - THE COURT CLARIFIES ITS RULING TO STATE THAT ATTORNEY FEES ARE DENIED. HOWEVER COSTS ARE AWARDED TO PETITIONER. Order signed in open court. In addition, the Court signed respondent's order re petitioner's writ of mandate re hearing of 7/8/11. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

Notice And Motion For Clarification Re Ruling On Petitioner Eric Kleinbub'S Petition For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Sep-12-2011 Continued To Sep-20-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: RESPONDENT DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES'S MOTION FOR CLARIFICATION RE RULING ON PETITIONER ERIC KLEINBUB'S PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE. No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: continued to September 20, 2011 to be heard by Judge Giorgi. Petitoner to provide a courtesy copy of response/opposition to department 302 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

Mtn To Vacate Stay
Off Calendar Jul-08-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PETITIONER ERIC KLEINBUB'S PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE.

APPEARANCES: Warner Bott Berry, Esq. 981-1870 for petitioner & moving party; no other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - THE PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE IS GRANTED. THE COURT VACATES THE DECISION AND REMANDS THE ACTION BACK TO RESPONDENT. RESPONDENT MUST RENDER A NEW DECISION AFTER REVIEWING AND CONSIDERING THE TRANSCRIPT FROM THE MOTION TO SUPRESS. Petitioner to prepare a proposed form of order. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Sonia Wong, CSR #11288

Mtn To Vacate Stay
Off Calendar May-26-2011 Continued To Jul-08-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: RESPONDENT DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES MOTION TO VACATE STAY.
Appearances: Warner Bott Berry (981.1870) for petitioner and opposing party; John T. McGlothlin of the Office of the Attorney General (510.622.2224) for respondent and moving party.
Discussed and the court ruled as follows: the matter is continued to July 8, 2011 for hearing. Respondent will provide petitioner with a copy of the record by May 31, 2011. Petitioner to file a brief by June 15, 2011; respondent to file a response by June 29, 2011; petitioner to reply by July 5, 2011. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
